channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Soft left on street, 8th March
item.description:
Abandoned sofa on street

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hervey Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pieces of broken glass scattered along footpath used by school & dog walkers, 8th March
item.description:
Priority please, Sunday 8th March: large thick pieces of broken glass are lying on footpath used by parents taking small/young pupils to entrance for Trinity Primary School. Walking & in buggies. It is dangerous. Enter path from Magpie Hall Lane, glass is scattered from 1st lamp post to 2nd lamp post. Can you please sweep and take away rather than sweeping into verges as injuries could be caused to wildlife & dogs. Many thanks.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Magpie Hall Lane, Bromley Common, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Water gushing onto Council Land, 8th March
item.description:
The waste water pipe from a Private Building is broken and gushing water onto Hackney Council communal land, which is causing a Health and safety issue and an Environmental issue near the Entrance to homes and stairwell.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lower Clapton Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 8th March
item.description:
Grafitti on the upper part of the M&S building on the High Street Side. It is high up (must have been done by leaning over while on the roof), but it is visible from the road and pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): High Street, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle, 8th March
item.description:
This vehicle is taxed but doesn't move. The owner is using it to store tools and comes once or twice a week to load up another car. (Often late at night).

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Minster Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 68, 8th March
item.description:
2 potholes that have become very deep and all rubble and stones are constantly projected onto the sidewalk, very dangerous for small children
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pilgrim's Lane, Belsize Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 8th March
item.description:
Grafitti on the white plastic gas unit cover (which is on the wall) on the corner of Rectory Road/The Crescent, of the health clinic at 14 The Crescent. There is grafitti on various places outside the entrance to pixie day nursery. There is grafitti (some only small) on the vertical piers surrounding/supporting the doorways of various premises up to Imm Fusion on the corner of Rectory Road/16 High Street. Thank you
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rectory Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Manhole cover broken, 8th March
item.description:
The lid and frame seem loose and make a loud painful noise every time a bus drives over it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Harrow Manorway, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside number 32, 8th March
item.description:
This bollard has been ripped off. It looks like a vehicular collision. There is part of ford wheel on the ground

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 32, Delancey Street, Chalk Farm, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Near side entrance to 48 Chatsworth in Coverdale, 8th March
item.description:
Bedding material, possibly a duvet and pillow
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chatsworth Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: East Dulwich Grove on the corner of Great Spilmans is making our foundations shake and loud noises when cars and buses go past., 8th March
item.description:
When buses and cars go past our house on the corner of East Dulwich Grove and Great Spilmans our house foundations shake and there is loud noise.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): East Dulwich Grove, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole crator, 8th March
item.description:
Yet another pothole crator. Been reported countless times. No one does anything . No one cares. Not even marked out. Council gone to sleep. .time for resident action
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ryecroft Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crofton Lane, Poverest, Greater London

item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lower Clapton Road, Hackney, London
